narrative:
Millcreek-West Unity Lsd (Williams) school district has 2,373 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
